cancer. Nodal Disease (N) category describes the regional lymph node involvement as defined for each 
cancer site. It may include the absence or presence of cancer in regional nodes and/or the number of 
positive nodes, size, or involvement. 

Nodal disease reporting was required for breast cancer, female GU other than ovarian cancer, gastro-
esophageal cancer, kidney cancer, malignant melanoma, ovarian cancer, pancreatic cancer, and 
prostate
